# update_project_public_client query

## 001_select_project_cognito_clients.sql

### SQLの概要

更新対象のpublic clientと現在versionを確認するため、Project Cognito clientを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_cognito_clients`
- `projects`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 取得元テーブル | 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>project_members, projects</code> | <code>actor_principal_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>project_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |

### 戻り値

| 取得元テーブル | 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>project_cognito_client_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>project_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>client_type</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>cognito_user_pool_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>app_client_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>app_client_name</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>allowed_oauth_flows</code> | <code>dict[str, Any]</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>base_allowed_scopes</code> | <code>dict[str, Any]</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>access_token_validity</code> | <code>int</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>access_token_unit</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>id_token_validity</code> | <code>int &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>id_token_unit</code> | <code>str &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>refresh_token_validity</code> | <code>int &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>refresh_token_unit</code> | <code>str &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>refresh_token_rotation_enabled</code> | <code>bool</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>retry_grace_period_seconds</code> | <code>int &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>enable_token_revocation</code> | <code>bool</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>row_version</code> | <code>int</code> | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON projects.project_id = project_cognito_clients.project_id`
- `JOIN ON project_members.project_id = projects.project_id AND project_members.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE project_cognito_clients.project_id = @project_id AND project_cognito_clients.client_type = 'PUBLIC_PKCE' AND (projects.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR project_members.member_role IN ('OWNER', 'ADMIN'))`

| <code>project_cognito_client_scopes</code> | <code>project_cognito_client_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_client_scopes</code> | <code>api_scope_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
